title: Improve Daily Sales Report & Add Product Management

requirements.summary: Update DailySalesReport.tsx to display enriched Z-report data with per-product profit and revenue calculations
acceptanceCriteria: Each product row shows: name, qty sold, selling price, buy price, revenue, profit
A summary section at the bottom shows total quantity sold, total revenue, total profit
All monetary values are formatted to 2 decimal places with AZN suffix
If no sales exist for today, a message like 'No sales recorded today' is shown

file_operations.description: Update the component to consume and display the enriched ZReport data structure returned by getZReport. Display per-product rows with productName, quantitySold, sellingPrice, purchasePrice, revenue, and profit. Add a summary section showing totalQuantitySold, totalRevenue, and totalProfit. Format all monetary values to 2 decimal places with AZN suffix. Handle empty state when no sales exist for today.

requirements.summary: Add mutation hooks for adding and deleting products in useQueries.ts
acceptanceCriteria: useAddProduct mutation calls actor.addProduct(name) and invalidates stock and sales queries on success
useDeleteProduct mutation calls actor.deleteProduct(name) and invalidates stock and sales queries on success
Both hooks expose isPending, isError, and error states for UI feedback

file_operations.description: Add useAddProduct mutation hook that calls actor.addProduct(name) and invalidates stockLevels, salesHistory, and zReport queries on success. Add useDeleteProduct mutation hook that calls actor.deleteProduct(name) and invalidates the same queries on success. Both hooks must expose isPending, isError, and error states for UI feedback.

requirements.summary: Create password-protected ProductManagement page with add and delete product capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: Page is reachable from the Dashboard via a 'Manage Products' button
Page shows a PasswordGate before revealing content
After authentication, a text input and 'Add Product' button are visible
Submitting a valid product name calls useAddProduct and shows a success message
Each product in the list has a delete button; tapping it shows an inline confirmation
Confirming deletion calls useDeleteProduct and the product disappears from the list
Error messages are shown if add or delete fails (e.g., duplicate name, product not found)
The product list is fetched from getStockLevels and refreshes after add/delete

file_operations.description: Create a new page component wrapped with PasswordGate (password: 'gulserxan'). After authentication, render a form with a text input and 'Add Product' button that calls useAddProduct. Below the form, fetch and display all products from useStockLevels. For each product, show the name and a delete (trash) button. Clicking delete shows an inline confirmation prompt; confirming calls useDeleteProduct. Display success and error feedback for both add and delete operations using toasts or inline messages. Use mobile-first styling matching existing dashboard buttons. All labels in English.

requirements.summary: Add 'Manage Products' navigation button to Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard renders a 'Manage Products' button alongside existing action buttons
Tapping the button navigates to the ProductManagement page
Button matches the styling (size, padding, rounded corners) of other dashboard buttons

file_operations.description: Add a new 'Manage Products' button to the dashboard navigation list. The button must follow the same full-width, large, mobile-first styling as existing dashboard buttons (using btn-amber or btn-secondary classes). Wire the button to navigate to /product-management route using TanStack Router Link component.

acceptanceCriteria: A route for /product-management (or equivalent) is defined in the TanStack Router config
The route renders the ProductManagement component
The back button in the header navigates back to the Dashboard from this page

file_operations.description: Add a new route definition for /product-management in the TanStack Router configuration. The route must render the ProductManagement component. Ensure the route is wrapped in the shared Layout so the Header back button functions correctly.

requirements.summary: Update all product selection pages to dynamically fetch products from getStockLevels instead of using hardcoded arrays
acceptanceCriteria: AddStock product selection step shows buttons for all products returned by getStockLevels
RecordSale product selection step shows buttons for all products returned by getStockLevels
ViewInventory list shows all products returned by getStockLevels
SalesHistory product filter includes all products returned by getStockLevels
No page references a hardcoded static array of product names
After a product is added or deleted via ProductManagement, the menus reflect the change on next data fetch

file_operations.description: Replace any hardcoded product name arrays with a dynamic fetch from useStockLevels. Render product selection buttons based on the fetched product list. Ensure the product list refreshes after products are added or deleted in ProductManagement.

Replace any hardcoded product name arrays with a dynamic fetch from useStockLevels. Render product selection buttons based on the fetched product list. Ensure the product list refreshes after products are added or deleted in ProductManagement.
Ensure the product list displayed is dynamically fetched from useStockLevels (already implemented). Verify that newly added products appear and deleted products disappear after query invalidation.

Replace any hardcoded product name arrays in the product filter dropdown with a dynamic fetch from useStockLevels. Ensure the filter options update after products are added or deleted in ProductManagement.
